query_basis: Programs table rows with verified state program evidence.
Waiver-like program rows or fallback to verified program rows when the state stores waiver entry in the general spine.
Verified early-intervention or Part C agency rows.
Verified regional education or district pages with special-education routing.

samples.sample_name: Mississippi Department of Education Office of Special Education

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-23 the MDEK12 root plus a bounded set of likely district-directory and OSE child paths.
blocker_evidence: Reviewed 2026-06-23 bounded Mississippi MDEK12 path probes. The public root https://www.mdek12.org/ itself returns the same short HTTP 403 shell as all bounded local-routing guesses, including /OTS/Directory, /School-Directory, /directory, /SchoolDirectory, /districts, /OSE, /Offices/OSE, /MBE/School-and-District-Directory, and /MBE/District-Directory. Every reviewed response preserves the same Microsoft-Azure-Application-Gateway/v2 403 shell rather than district rows, school-search content, or district-owned leaves. Mississippi therefore remains blocked on district_or_county_education_routing because the official MDEK12 public host is host-wide blocked in the current low-token lane, not because one specific directory child path is stale.

samples.sample_name: Mississippi Department of Education Office of Special Education
samples.evidence_snippet: The likely special-education lane returned HTTP 403 in bounded low-token mode.
The likely district-directory lane returned HTTP 403 in bounded low-token mode instead of exposing district-owned local routing leaves.
The statewide MDE root is still being reused as fallback evidence for local routing rows.

query_basis: Reviewed first-party MDRS routing now preserves live statewide vocational rehabilitation and Pre-Employment Transition Services paths.

samples.evidence_snippet: The MDRS site preserves a live Office of Vocational Rehabilitation route on its first-party navigation.
The MDRS site preserves a live first-party Pre-Employment Transition Services route under vocational rehabilitation.

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-22 the live first-party DRMS about page over HTTP plus the homepage fallback.

samples.evidence_snippet: The About DRMS page says Disability Rights Mississippi is Mississippi’s Protection & Advocacy agency and has a federal mandate to protect and advocate for the rights of individuals with disabilities across Mississippi.
The live first-party DRMS homepage proves the likely P&A domain is reachable over HTTP even though HTTPS bounded fetches failed TLS handshake.

query_basis: Reviewed first-party Mississippi PTI evidence on disk explicitly preserves Parent Training and Information Center designation text plus family-support and IDEA/transition guidance.

samples.sample_name: Mississippi Parent Training and Information Center
samples.evidence_snippet: Welcome to the Mississippi Parent Training and Information Center! Everything we do is designed to help parents and families of children with disabilities. If you are the parent or family member of a child with a disability, age birth to 26, our job is to provide your family with information, resources, support and training. The contents of this website were developed under a grant from the US Department of Education, #H328M200082.
The Mississippi Center for Justice homepage is live and preserves a first-party statewide legal-justice route on disk.

query_basis: Verified ABLE program pages from the program spine.
Reviewed 2026-06-22 the official Mississippi DHS contact page and its embedded county-office table.

samples.evidence_snippet: The live MDHS contact page embeds a County Offices table directly in HTML with site name, physical address, contact email, and client contact phone number columns.
Bounded review of the first-party county-office table preserved 82 unique county names, with branch duplicates such as Bolivar and Monroe but statewide county coverage intact.
The first-party county table visibly lists county offices ranging from Adams County Office and Alcorn County Office through Washington County Office, Wilkinson County Office, and Yazoo County Office.
